Subject: My "Thank You" FAQ

Hi <firstname>

I've gotten a bunch of questions about my "Thank You"
bundle, so I decided to put together a Frequently Asked
Questions update, just to clear up any questions you might
have...


QUESTION: I am not in a long distance relationship, why
would I want your products?

ANSWER: This is a great question. First I want to point out
that only a small portion of the items in my "Mother Of All
Offers" bundle is specifically for Long Distance
Relationships. Most of the products are for bringing greater
passion, romance, and love into your relationship.

But even more important, all of us have times when we are in
a Long Distance Relationship... whether we are on a short
business trip or just spending the night apart.

And these tips, techniques and secrets can spice things up,
even when you are just apart for a few hours.

Truthfully, you might start to find ways to separate
yourselves for a little bit just to get a chance to put your
Long Distance Lovemaking guide to work. 

Think about it, you might send your sweetie into the next
room armed only with a cell phone.  :-)

You can see my entire "thank you" bundle here:
http://www.goromance.com/MotherOfAllOffers.html



QUESTION: Is it right to use someone else's Love Letters? 

ANSWER: Well, if it doesn't feel right for you, then it
isn't right. But there is no reason you shouldn't use Love
Letters Now for inspiration or for a starting point. 

The important part about a Love Letter is that you create it
and send it. When was the last time you gave your sweetie a
love letter? I bet it has been too long. 

That's because the toughest part of writing a Love Letter is
starting it. With Love Letters Now you don't ever have to
worry about that - I've got your back!



QUESTION: Does this stuff really work? I mean, shouldn't a
relationship come naturally? 

ANSWER: If only it were that simple! This is the deal - you
can try to build a house with just a hammer and a hand saw.
And some people could probably succeed. Many one in a
million would end up with beautiful house. 

But wouldn't it be a lot easier with a full set of tools?
Maybe a full set of power tools?

Most of us just don't have the right tools to build great
relationships full of fun, romance, and spice. My bundle
gives you all the tools you need to build that relationship.

They aren't intended to replace anything in your
relationship - they just enhance it.

You can see my entire "thank you" bundle here:
http://www.goromance.com/MotherOfAllOffers.html



warmly,
Leslie

P.S.> Remember, this special offer ends on Thursday:
